build.beforeDevCommand: rm -rf tauri-dist && mkdir -p tauri-dist/vendor && cp index.html styles.css app.js tauri-dist/ && cp node_modules/lucide/dist/umd/lucide.min.js tauri-dist/vendor/
build.beforeBuildCommand: rm -rf tauri-dist && mkdir -p tauri-dist/vendor && cp index.html styles.css app.js tauri-dist/ && cp node_modules/lucide/dist/umd/lucide.min.js tauri-dist/vendor/
